name: Boat ishmael in the fog.
description:
This is literally the Voidsea😔

So basically you take place instead of ahab and recruit ishmael, but the thing is you two are the only ones a part of the crew, and yall aint looking for whales, just wandering without a destination

I need suggestions cause i ran out of ideas a long time ago.
